title: Rewrite recursive walker with pattern-matched heads and deep destructure
prompt:
Given:

```
def sum_leaves(tree) do
  if tree == nil do
    0
  else
    if is_integer(tree) do
      tree
    else
      sum_leaves(tree.left) + sum_leaves(tree.right)
    end
  end
end
```

Rewrite as three function heads: one matching `nil`, one matching `n when is_integer(n)`, one matching `%{left: left, right: right}`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Tree do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Classic recursion-over-tree pattern but requires synthesizing four capabilities.
